title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Swiggy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
